items.title: Respond to VanishID on preemption interest — term sheets expected in coming weeks
items.context: Email from matt@vanishid.com on Apr 28: 'Are you interested in preempting?' Insiders want 50%+ of round, strong quarterly results expected. Logan said he'd dig in over the weekend but hasn't responded.

items.title: Send strategic LP intro emails for Opti using Barak's sales deck and one-pager
items.context: Email from Richie on Apr 29: 'Derek and I are going to get started with potential strategic intros.' Barak shared one-pager and tailored intro paragraphs for financial services outreach.

items.title: Respond to Sean Larson — schedule call with Matthew re: round timing
items.context: Email from sean@trylotline.com on Apr 29 (unread): Offered continued pilot pricing for family properties and asked about scheduling a call with Matthew. Previous thread discussed round timing.

items.title: Follow up on Morgan Stanley <> Echelon AI intro — confirm if meeting was scheduled
items.context: Email from eddie@echelonai.com on Apr 24: Fan intro'd Echelon to Tunde at Morgan Stanley. Eddie proposed meeting times (Apr 28, Apr 30, May 11-13). No confirmation visible yet.
